project_meta.primary_goal: Build a self-contained, production-ready educational web app using local JSON as a NoSQL-like store, focused on fundamentals learning, NEET/JEE practice, and basic career tools.
project_meta.session_rule: Complete a minimal but working system in ONE agent session. Do not expand scope beyond this spec.

1_scope.description: Never add new big features or new product lines not listed here.

2_files_changes.description: Only create or edit files that are clearly required by the spec.
rules: Before editing, quickly describe WHAT will change and WHY.
If a file would be identical after edit, DO NOT rewrite it.
No duplicate files with similar names (e.g., no app2, app_final).

3_json_db_rules.description: Local JSON files act as a NoSQL-like database.
rules: Do NOT use external DB services.
All data stored under /data as JSON.
Each file must stay under ~5 MB during MVP.
Always load, modify in memory, then save back.
Summarize the plan in <= 5 bullet points before generating code.
Generate only the minimal initial code to make module usable.
Prefer small components over huge monolithic files.
Never rewrite large code blocks just to change formatting or comments.

5_education_ethics.description: Platform must teach, not just give answers.
rules: Always prompt learners to attempt before revealing full solutions.
Solutions should be stepwise and explanatory.
No 'one-click answer my homework' features for students.
